title: Foundry
point: Foundry produces metal objects by melting metal and pouring into moulds.

title: Casting
point: Casting is a fundamental metal forming method.

title: Steel Plants
point: Integrated steel plants maintain captive foundries.

title: Repair Shops
point: Centralized workshops support repairs and reconditioning.

title: Welding
point: Welding is a material joining process.

title: Forging
point: Forging shapes metal using force with or without heat.

title: Machining
point: Machining removes extra material as chips.

title: Oxygen Purity
point: Liquid and gaseous oxygen purity exceeds 99.55%.

title: Protective Gas
point: Protective gas contains 95% nitrogen and 5% hydrogen.

title: Water Management
point: Handles water supply and disposal systems.

title: RCL
point: Research and Control Laboratory maintains product quality.

title: RCL Wings
point: Metallurgical, Chemical, Mechanical, Inspection and R&D wings.

title: RED
point: Refractory Engineering Department manages refractory maintenance.
